parameters.content:
## ai_content_repurposing_machine

### How it works

This workflow turns a YouTube video transcript into repurposed LinkedIn content. It starts with a form submission, retrieves and processes the transcript, sends it to Gemini for content generation, parses the result, saves it in Google Sheets, and publishes it to LinkedIn. It also has a separate error logging path that records failures to a sheet.

### Setup steps

- Configure the form trigger with the fields required by the workflow, such as the YouTube video URL or video ID.
- Add RapidAPI credentials or headers for the YouTube Transcript API request node.
- Connect Google Gemini credentials for the Gemini chat model used by the LLM chain.
- Connect Google Sheets credentials and set the spreadsheet, sheet names, and column mappings for content records, status updates, and error logs.
- Connect LinkedIn credentials and verify the target profile or organization page for publishing.
- Review the custom code nodes to ensure they match the transcript API response format and the expected AI response structure.

### Customization

You can adjust the Gemini prompt to produce different content formats, change the Google Sheets columns used for tracking, or replace LinkedIn publishing with another social channel.

## Collect video transcript

Starts from a submitted form, fetches the YouTube transcript through the RapidAPI transcript endpoint, and runs custom code to clean or normalize the transcript for downstream AI processing.

## Generate and parse content

Uses a Gemini-powered LLM chain to repurpose the processed transcript into social content, then parses the AI output into structured fields for saving and publishing.

## Publish and update status

Appends the generated content to Google Sheets, publishes it to LinkedIn, and updates the sheet with either posted or failed status based on the publishing result.

## Handle workflow errors

A separate lower canvas cluster that receives errors from transcript fetching, transcript processing, AI generation, parsing, and sheet appending, formats the error details, and logs them to Google Sheets.

parameters.formDescription: Enter a YouTube video URL to automatically generate multiple content assets.

nodes.name: Fetch Transcript from YouTube
nodes.notes: Calls RapidAPI transcript API and pulls transcript text from the submitted YouTube URL.

nodes.name: Process YouTube Transcript
nodes.notes: Normalizes transcript API output into a clean single string.

nodes.name: Generate Content with LLM
nodes.notes: Generates all requested content assets from the cleaned transcript using Gemini.

parameters.text:
=You are an expert content repurposing strategist. Analyze the following YouTube transcript and return ONLY valid JSON with these exact keys: title, summary, blog, linkedin, twitter_thread, newsletter, content_ideas, viral_hooks, cta_suggestions.

Rules:
- title: concise and SEO-friendly
- summary: 150-200 words
- blog: minimum 1500 words in markdown with headings
- linkedin: highly engaging post for LinkedIn
- twitter_thread: exactly 10 tweets, numbered 1/10 to 10/10
- newsletter: 400-600 words with subject line
- content_ideas: 5 ideas as numbered list
- viral_hooks: 10 hooks as numbered list
- cta_suggestions: 5 CTA suggestions as numbered list
- Return raw JSON only, no code fences, no commentary

YouTube URL: {{ $json.youtubeUrl }}

Transcript:
{{ $json.transcript }}

nodes.name: AI Chat Model
nodes.notes: Gemini chat model connected to the Basic LLM Chain node.

nodes.name: Parse Content Response
nodes.notes: Parses the Gemini JSON response and prepares a normalized object for downstream steps.

nodes.name: Append Output to Sheets
nodes.notes: Appends all generated content into Sheet1. Create the exact header names in advance.

nodes.name: Post Content on LinkedIn
nodes.notes: Publishes the AI-generated LinkedIn post to your LinkedIn profile. Uses OAuth2 for authentication. Ensure your LinkedIn OAuth2 credentials are configured in n8n credentials.

nodes.name: Update Posted Status in Sheets
nodes.notes: Marks the matching row as Posted after successful LinkedIn publish.

nodes.name: Update Failure Status in Sheets
nodes.notes: Marks the matching row as Failed with the LinkedIn error message when publishing fails.

nodes.name: Log Errors to Sheets
nodes.notes: Appends transcript, Gemini, parse, or sheets errors to the Errors tab.

nodes.name: Handle Errors in Workflow
nodes.notes: Normalizes upstream errors into a simple row format for the Errors sheet.
